sectionsAdded: Note about non-nullable AccessSettings on event data states (callout block in 'Assign handlers to events' section)
docFactsUsed: AREA-003: Setting AccessSettings to null on event data states now throws ArgumentNullException. Use ContentAccessSettings.Public() for unsecured.
AREA-004: Same null validation on website event data states, WebPageMetadata, CreateWebPageParameters.
gaps: No existing code examples on this page set AccessSettings to null, so acceptance criterion #1 (update examples) is satisfied vacuously — there was nothing to update.
notes: Attempt 2: Added bold title "**Non-nullable AccessSettings**" on its own line after {% note %} tag per INV-callout-002. The note block spans multiple paragraphs so a bold title is mandatory. Addresses STY-001 from review feedback.
